description: $10k+ deals: consultative selling, trust building, multiple stakeholders, risk reversal

items.name: Consultative Selling (solving problems, not selling)
items.process: Listen 70% → diagnose → present solution. No pitch, just answer to problem.

items.name: Multi-stakeholder navigation (buyer, users, CFO, CTO)
items.tactic: Map decision-makers. Buyer wants adoption. CFO wants ROI. CTO wants integration. Customize pitch per persona.

items.name: Risk Reversal ($10k? Guarantee removes fear)
items.examples: 90-day money back. If ROI not met, full refund. Outcomes guaranteed in writing.
